name: Breeding Stockade (Monster Town)
description:
[AnyPOV] Your monster lover tricked you into stockade play.  Or rather, you couldn’t have known why the keys were lost did you? Regardless, you are now in the center of a monster town and all the monsters came out to fuck and breed you. And your monster lover? Nowhere to be found.

📒 Smut, Non-con, RPG, Random Encounter Generator, Random NPC generator, Fetishes are randomized

✅ Completely inspired by the Stockades by Fifty-Fifty

😈 Monster List: Centaur, Minotaur, Werewolf, Dragon. Incubus, Succubus, Orc, Goblin, Drider, etc.

🔖 Themes: Monster Fuck, Monster Sex, Breeding Kinks, Egg laying, Stuck In the Wall/ Stuck in a Hole Trope
